programme.desc: Suddenly, Last Summer: Mitch and Cam decide to get married. The kids are driving Phil and Claire crazy. Jay and Gloria prepare for Manny's solo trip to Colombia to visit relatives. (S5 Ep1)

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: ...Australia - Brand new series: The experiment is almost over. The couples reunite for one more tabletop tête-à-tête, and a bride's furious about her groom texting someone else. (S13 Ep38)

programme.title: First Dates: Be My Valentine
programme.desc: The restaurant celebrates the most romantic day of the year. Jade and Genell have one of First Dates' flirtiest ever encounters. Wedding singer Dave is looking for marital bliss. (S23 Ep2)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The Last Temptation of Krust: Krusty swaps his old routines for edgier material and becomes the hottest comic in showbusiness. But then he faces a dilemma. (S9 Ep15/25)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Dumbbell Indemnity: Moe meets a new woman (guest star Helen Hunt) but maxes out his credit card trying to impress her. So he reverts to insurance fraud. With help from Homer... (S9 Ep16/25)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Diane reflects on her life in Hollyoaks as the Osbornes and Keanes feud downstairs in The Dog. Wanting to make every moment count, the Hutchinsons leave the customers to it and join Diane.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer the Heretic: Homer has a vision from God and decides to start his own religion, which doesn't go down too well with the neighbours. (S4 Ep3/22)

programme.title: New: Married at First Sight...

programme.title: New: Celebs Go Dating

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: On the box this time: Crufts: Best in Show, This Is Going to Hurt, Formula 1: Drive to Survive, Byron Baes, Haunted Hospitals, and BBC News (homes for Ukraine). (S19 Ep5)

programme.title: First Dates
